summary: Iteration 65 testing complete - All 16 features verified. Services/Testimonials visibility+ordering, Partners/Clients standardized schemas, Contact/About rich text descriptions, Footer newsletter settings, Aurex section anchor IDs, News summary HTML, and Back-to-top button all working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 tested: (1) Services CMS drag-drop reorder + hide toggle working, (2) Testimonials CMS hide toggle working, (3) Partners+Clients Aurex sections have standardized fields (eyebrow, title, subtitle, cta_*, autoscroll, scroll_speed), (4) Contact description is rich text, (5) Footer newsletter text/placeholder editable from Settings, (6) About description is rich text, (7) All Aurex sections have anchor IDs (aurex-audience, aurex-process, aurex-pricing, aurex-team, aurex-events, aurex-partners, aurex-clients, aurex-video), (8) News summary renders as HTML, (9) Back-to-top button appears on scroll and works. Two items deferred: 'Notify Me!' form and Page Builder 'Login Required' flag.

services_cms.drag_drop_reorder: PASS - 7 drag handles visible, PUT /api/admin/services/{id} persists order field
services_cms.hide_toggle: PASS - 7 visibility toggle buttons visible, PUT persists visible=false
services_cms.edit_dialog_visible_switch: PASS - 'Visible on website' switch found in edit dialog

testimonials_cms.hide_toggle: PASS - 5 visibility toggle buttons visible in list
testimonials_cms.edit_dialog_visible_switch: PASS - 'Visible on site' switch found in edit dialog
testimonials_cms.public_api_filters_hidden: PASS - GET /api/public/testimonials filters out visible=false items

partners_clients_schemas.partners_standardized_fields: PASS - eyebrow, title, subtitle, cta_text, cta_url, cta_new_tab, autoscroll, scroll_speed all present
partners_clients_schemas.clients_standardized_fields: PASS - same fields present and working
partners_clients_schemas.consistent_h2_sizes: PASS - Both Partners and Clients h2 at 48px

contact_description_rich_text.cms_editor: PASS - RichTextEditor visible in Landing Page Content
contact_description_rich_text.frontend_rendering: PASS - rich-text-content class present, HTML rendered correctly

footer_newsletter_settings.settings_fields: PASS - footer_newsletter_text and footer_newsletter_placeholder in Settings
footer_newsletter_settings.frontend_rendering: PASS - 'Get the latest insights delivered to your inbox.' displayed with email input

about_description_rich_text.cms_editor: PASS - RichTextEditor visible in About Manager

news_summary_html.cms_accepts_html: PASS - POST /api/admin/blog accepts HTML in summary field
news_summary_html.frontend_rendering: PASS - rich-text-content class present in News section
